title: piliostigma rufescens
intro: Piliostigma rufescens, also known as the Piliostigma tree or Neem of West Africa, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Piliostigma rufescens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and ointments.
